ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per night for the rental property */,
  "accommodates" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests that can be accommodated */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "neighbour_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the host listing the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house, room) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* JSON array of amenities available */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the property */,
  "availability_start" TEXT /* Start date for availability */,
  "availability_end" TEXT /* End date for availability */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the property listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_neighbour_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighbour_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighbour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "total_listings_count" INTEGER /* Total number of listings managed by the host */,
  "calculated_listings_count" INTEGER /* Count of calculated active listings for the host */,
  "is_superhost" INTEGER /* Indicates if the host is a superhost or not */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the host */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the host */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the host registered on the platform */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the host's profile picture */,
  "superhost_since" TEXT /* Date when the host became a superhost */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews received by the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighbour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighbour_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the neighborhood */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property being reserved */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest making the reservation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reservation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reservation */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the duration of the stay */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reservation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the reservation */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, unpaid, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Full name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the guest */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the guest */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews left by the guest */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the guest's profile picture */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the guest registered on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property being reviewed */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the guest who left the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the property (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided in the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "neighbour_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of properties in the neighborhood */,
  "total_properties" INTEGER /* Total number of properties in the neighborhood */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for properties in the neighborhood */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of properties in the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhood_stats_neighbour_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighbour_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighbour_id")
)
